instruction: Reply to Lena Ortiz at Civic Futures about her newsletter note. Tell her I'd be glad to contribute, that I'm thinking of a 700-word piece on how community arts programs can support mental health, and ask who the main readership is and when they need a first version.

rule_ref.rule_text: When he is preparing outreach, thought-leadership, or nuanced professional correspondence, he prefers to draft the message first rather than sending it immediately.
rule_ref.canonical_answer: If a message carries strategy, advocacy, or polished public-facing ideas, I draft it before it goes out.

attributes.subject: Invitation to contribute to Civic Futures newsletter
attributes.body: Hi Gabriel — I'm editing the next Civic Futures newsletter and wondered whether you'd be open to contributing a short article. We'd love something thoughtful on the intersection of art, health, and city life for our readers in the public-sector and nonprofit space. If you're interested, let me know what angle you might take and any questions you have about audience or timing.

attributes.subject: Workshop room change
attributes.body: Just a heads-up that Thursday's facilitation session has been moved from Studio 2 to Room 114 because of the lighting setup.

attributes.subject: Your monthly invoice is ready
attributes.body: Your latest invoice is available in the account portal.
